projectName: Bob the Builder and Spud plush
description: Bob the Builder and Spud plush — electronics repair, cleaning and refresh, and sewing and fabric repair.
itemDetails:
Bob the Builder and Spud plush toys are licensed character merchandise from the Bob the Builder franchise era that was especially strong in the late 1990s and 2000s. Character pairings were commonly sold as companion plush sets for preschool audiences.

Typical construction uses polyester plush and fill with embroidered or printed facial details, and some variants include sound modules. Market value is moderate, with complete character pairs and clean franchise tags preferred over single loose pieces.
